title: Payment debited twice for annual subscription
body: Customer says their card was charged twice and wants a refund invoice correction before finance close.

title: Checkout outage impacting multiple merchants
body: Several merchants report checkout down after the latest release. Orders are failing with payment timeout errors.

title: OTP login not working on Android
body: User cannot login because OTP screen crashes repeatedly after entering mobile number.

title: Late delivery for premium customer
body: Shipment has been delayed for 3 days and customer is requesting escalation with latest ETA.

title: Feature request for bulk export
body: Customer success team requested CSV export for filtered ticket analytics and recurring reports.

title: Positive feedback for support agent
body: Customer thanked support team for resolving onboarding issue quickly.

title: GST invoice mismatch
body: Finance team reports GST number is incorrect on invoice and customer needs corrected document today.

title: API integration failure after token rotation
body: Partner integration started failing after token rotation. Error logs show unauthorized responses from webhook calls.
